<!-- Copyright © 2023-2026 ValidMind Inc. All rights reserved.
Refer to the LICENSE file in the root of this repository for details.
SPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0 AND ValidMind Commercial -->

:::: {.content-visible when-format="html" when-meta="includes.glossary"}
records
: The broader term for items tracked in the {{< var validmind.platform >}} inventory.^[**Refer to:** [inventory](/about/glossary/glossary.qmd#inventory)] Records include traditional statistical models, legacy systems, artificial intelligence/machine learning models, large language models (LLMs), agentic AI systems, and other documentable items that benefit from oversight, testing, and lifecycle management.

::::

:::: {.content-visible when-format="html" unless-meta="includes.glossary"}
records
: The broader term for items tracked in the {{< var validmind.platform >}} inventory. Records include traditional statistical models, legacy systems, artificial intelligence/machine learning models, large language models (LLMs), agentic AI systems, and other documentable items that benefit from oversight, testing, and lifecycle management.
::::
